name: fitness-studio
description: Lead nurturing and CRM automation for fitness studios. Connects Calendly, Notion, Stripe and Outlook into an automated pipeline.

notion_token.description: Your Notion API token — get it from notion.so/my-integrations (starts with secret_...)

notion_database_id.description: Your Leads CRM database ID — copy from the Notion URL after your workspace name

membership_link.description: The link you send leads to sign up (e.g. https://yourstudio.com/join)

studio_email.description: The email address to send from (e.g. hello@mystudio.com)

zapier_email_webhook.description: Your Zapier webhook URL for sending emails via Outlook (from Zap 3 in setup)
